records.m_Talk_ENG: Persistent, aren't you. I've never fought someone who could keep a battle going this long.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Persistent, aren't you. I've never fought someone who could keep a battle going this long.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Persistent, aren't you. I've never fought someone who could keep a battle going this long.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Really? I've faced plenty of opponents as strong as you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Really? I've faced plenty of opponents as strong as you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Really? I've faced plenty of opponents as strong as you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For someone who says that, you don't seem to be making much progress. Are you trying to drag this out?
records.m_Talk_DEU: For someone who says that, you don't seem to be making much progress. Are you trying to drag this out?
records.m_Talk_FRA: For someone who says that, you don't seem to be making much progress. Are you trying to drag this out?

records.m_Talk_ENG: How about calling it being careful?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How about calling it being careful?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How about calling it being careful?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you lose track of me because of the smoke?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you lose track of me because of the smoke?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you lose track of me because of the smoke?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now's my chance while you're looking the other way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now's my chance while you're looking the other way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now's my chance while you're looking the other way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Got you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Got you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Got you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My waist just twisted?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: My waist just twisted?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: My waist just twisted?!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Agh. She's also a doll
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Agh. She's also a doll
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Agh. She's also a doll
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Horizon?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Horizon?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Horizon?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That was close.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That was close.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That was close.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Halftime is over.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Halftime is over.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Halftime is over.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How were you able to return?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How were you able to return?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How were you able to return?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Turns out my sponsor had some backing even I didn't know about. Thanks to that, I found a way through.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Turns out my sponsor had some backing even I didn't know about. Thanks to that, I found a way through.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Turns out my sponsor had some backing even I didn't know about. Thanks to that, I found a way through.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I have no idea what nonsense you're talking about.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I have no idea what nonsense you're talking about.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I have no idea what nonsense you're talking about.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you interfere again, this time it won't end with exile.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you interfere again, this time it won't end with exile.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you interfere again, this time it won't end with exile.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did I ask you to go easy on me? Blame yourself for your recklessness once you lose.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did I ask you to go easy on me? Blame yourself for your recklessness once you lose.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did I ask you to go easy on me? Blame yourself for your recklessness once you lose.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Intruders who seek to harm the Promised Land... will not be tolerated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Intruders who seek to harm the Promised Land... will not be tolerated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Intruders who seek to harm the Promised Land... will not be tolerated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it's to protect humanity's world, I'll do whatever it takes as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it's to protect humanity's world, I'll do whatever it takes as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it's to protect humanity's world, I'll do whatever it takes as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I'm different from you. You protect the Promised Land because you were ordered to. But this is my own will, not someone else's command.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I'm different from you. You protect the Promised Land because you were ordered to. But this is my own will, not someone else's command.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I'm different from you. You protect the Promised Land because you were ordered to. But this is my own will, not someone else's command.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just wordplay. It means the same thing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just wordplay. It means the same thing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just wordplay. It means the same thing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. It's completely different.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. It's completely different.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. It's completely different.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A command is a thoroughly calculated protocol, but will is a collection of variables bound by nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A command is a thoroughly calculated protocol, but will is a collection of variables bound by nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A command is a thoroughly calculated protocol, but will is a collection of variables bound by nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That Golden Tree is Thagirion's throne.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That Golden Tree is Thagirion's throne.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That Golden Tree is Thagirion's throne.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Go ahead with the others first, Mina.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Go ahead with the others first, Mina.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Go ahead with the others first, Mina.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...All right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...All right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...All right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Be careful, Horizon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Be careful, Horizon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Be careful, Horizon.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Now, who gave you permission to
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Now, who gave you permission to
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Now, who gave you permission to
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Opening coordinates. Now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Opening coordinates. Now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Opening coordinates. Now.
